techjs.command.reload_storage.hint_apply: Tip: run /techjs apply to apply changes
techjs.command.list.note: Note: technologies that haven't been operated on are not stored and won't appear here
techjs.command.apply.no_changes: No pending tech changes to apply
techjs.command.apply.success: Tech changes applied — reloading recipes and firing onTechLoad
techjs.command.help.title: TechJS Commands
techjs.command.help.list: /techjs list - List unlocked technologies (only shows operated/enabled ones)
techjs.command.help.lock: /techjs lock <id> - Lock a tech; if it doesn't exist it will be added as locked
techjs.command.help.add_tech: /techjs add_tech <id> - Explicitly add a tech (equivalent to setting it locked)
techjs.command.help.apply: /techjs apply - If there are changes, reload recipes and trigger onTechLoad
techjs.command.help.note: Tip: technologies not operated on aren't automatically stored; only lock/unlock/add_tech save them
